text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Kikuka Sho is here. Gold City is so
focused, I hesitate to get her attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time, for sure, she'll get the recognition she
so desires. She heads out to the racecourse with
purpose.
